assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, an email address or GitHub identity, and a non-prepaid debit or credit card.
No PlanetScale account, organization, database, or default role exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a PlanetScale account, provision a first database, and obtain usable connection credentials.

first_success.outcome: A PlanetScale database with a main branch is provisioned and connection credentials for the default role are visible.
first_success.observable_signal: The Connect flow shows host, username, password, database, port, and generated connection strings after Create default role.

route_selection.rule: Prefer Dashboard over CLI when both reach the same database-ready outcome; resolve Postgres versus Vitess only when the developer goal fixes an engine.

candidates.name: Dashboard PlanetScale Postgres quickstart
candidates.reason: Strong official Postgres path, but engine choice versus Vitess remains consequential and signup/org field completeness is incomplete.

candidates.name: Dashboard Vitess / MySQL quickstart
candidates.reason: Official Vitess quickstart is a peer database-engine path with different password/role mechanics.

candidates.name: PlanetScale CLI pscale signup and database create
candidates.reason: CLI is documented as an automation alternative to the Dashboard path, not the primary self-service web surface.

required_path.action: Create a PlanetScale account from the sign-up surface and complete any required confirmation.
required_path.observable_result: The developer can open the PlanetScale dashboard and create or select an organization.

required_path.action: Create or select the organization that will own the database.

required_fields.label: Organization details
required_fields.notes: Quickstart says new accounts are prompted to create an organization but does not enumerate the form fields.

required_path.observable_result: An organization context is active in the dashboard.

required_path.action: Add a valid debit or credit card on Organization Settings > Billing.

required_fields.label: Payment method
required_fields.notes: All plans require a valid payment method; prepaid cards are not accepted.

required_path.observable_result: The organization has a payment method on file.

required_path.action: Click New database, choose an engine, configure the cluster, and create the database.

required_fields.label: Database engine
required_fields.notes: Postgres versus Vitess remains an unresolved route choice.

required_path.observable_result: PlanetScale provisions the database with a main branch.

required_path.action: Open Connect, create the Default role, and record the connection details.
required_path.observable_result: Host, username, password, database, port, and connection strings are available.

prerequisites.description: A valid non-prepaid debit or credit card for organization billing.

external_gates.description: Payment method on file is required for all plans before database usage.
GitHub authorization when Continue with GitHub is chosen for signup.

unavoidable_waits.description: PlanetScale must provision the Postgres or Vitess cluster and main branch after Create database.
Card pre-authorization holds may appear when adding a billing method or creating a database.

platform_outcomes.description: Create database provisions the cluster, main branch, default databases, monitoring, and HA settings.
Create default role issues one-time-visible credentials and connection string helpers.

excluded.reason: Quickstart recommends creating another role after first success but does not require it for credential visibility.
Documented as an automation alternative to Dashboard creation.

sources.title: PlanetScale Postgres quickstart
evidence_supported: Create database and default role Connect flow

sources.title: Billing
evidence_supported: All plans require a valid payment method
Debit or credit card, no prepaid

uncertainties.question: Is the canonical first database Postgres or Vitess when the developer goal only says PlanetScale?
uncertainties.impact: Engine choice changes create-form options, credential APIs, and which quickstart terminal applies.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Bound the goal to one engine, or confirm a vendor-default engine for brand-new organizations.

uncertainties.question: What exact organization-creation fields and email-confirmation steps occur after signup?
uncertainties.impact: Missing org fields or confirmation steps change required-action and required-field counts before billing and New database.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated walkthrough from auth.planetscale.com/sign-up through first organization ready state.
